title: Visit a Museum
description: Spend at least one hour exploring a museum you've never been to before.

title: Attend a Live Music Event
description: Go see live music — a concert, an open mic, a jazz bar, a busker stage. Feel the sound in person.

title: Explore a New Neighbourhood
description: Spend an hour wandering a neighbourhood you've never visited. No map, no plan.

title: Try a Cuisine You've Never Had
description: Find a restaurant serving food from a country you've never eaten from. Order something authentic.

title: Attend a Meetup or Community Event
description: Find a meetup, talk, or community event happening near you and show up alone.

title: Visit a Historical Site
description: Find a historical monument, ruin, or heritage site within reach and visit it.

title: Cook a Full Meal from a Foreign Country
description: Pick a country, find an authentic recipe, buy the ingredients, and cook the full meal from scratch.

title: Hike a Trail You've Never Done
description: Find a hiking trail or nature walk you've never attempted and complete it.

title: Visit an Art Gallery
description: Spend time in an art gallery — public or independent. Find one piece that moves you.

title: Eat at a Street Food Market
description: Visit a street food market and eat from at least two different stalls you've never tried.

title: Ride Public Transport to an Unknown Stop
description: Get on a bus, train, or tram and ride it to a stop you've never been to. Explore when you arrive.

title: Join a Pickup Sports Game
description: Find a group playing a sport in a park or gym and ask to join. Football, basketball, volleyball — anything.

title: Visit a Botanical Garden or Greenhouse
description: Find a botanical garden, greenhouse, or plant nursery and spend at least 30 minutes among the greenery.

title: Attend a Workshop or Class
description: Sign up for any class — pottery, cooking, painting, dancing, coding. Learn something in person.

title: Go on a Themed Photo Walk
description: Pick a theme — doors, reflections, textures, shadows — and walk for an hour photographing only that.

title: Introduce Yourself to a Neighbour
description: Knock on a neighbour's door or approach them outside and introduce yourself properly.

title: Explore a Flea Market or Thrift Shop
description: Spend an hour at a flea market, vintage shop, or thrift store. Find one item with a story.

title: Swim in an Outdoor Body of Water
description: Find a lake, river, sea, or outdoor pool and go for a swim.

title: Spend an Hour in a Library
description: Visit a library you've never been to. Browse freely, sit down, read something unexpected.

title: Host a Dinner for Friends
description: Invite at least 3 people over and cook dinner for them. Set the table properly.

title: Visit a Place of Worship You've Never Entered
description: Enter a church, mosque, temple, or synagogue you've never been inside. Observe respectfully.

title: Bike Ride to Somewhere New
description: Get on a bike and ride to a part of your city or area you've never cycled to before.

title: Take a Cooking Class
description: Find and attend a cooking class — pasta, sushi, bread, anything. Learn a new technique in person.

title: Watch the Sunrise from a High Point
description: Wake early and find a viewpoint — a hill, a rooftop, a bridge — and watch the sun rise.

title: See a Theatre Performance
description: Attend any theatre show — a play, a comedy night, improv, a dance performance.

title: Eat Alone at a Nice Restaurant
description: Book a table for one at a restaurant nicer than your usual. Order properly. Enjoy your own company.

title: Visit an Old Cemetery
description: Walk through an old cemetery. Read the headstones. Think about the lives they represent.

title: Organise a Picnic
description: Plan a proper picnic — food, blanket, drinks — and invite at least one other person.

title: Try Indoor Rock Climbing
description: Visit a climbing gym and attempt at least 3 routes. Fall. Try again.

title: Visit a Local Farm or Orchard
description: Find a nearby farm, vineyard, or orchard that accepts visitors. See where food comes from.

title: Take a Dance Class
description: Attend a beginner dance class — salsa, swing, hip-hop, anything. Move your body differently.

title: Visit an Aquarium or Zoo
description: Spend at least an hour at an aquarium or zoo. Watch one animal for 10 uninterrupted minutes.

title: Write and Mail a Physical Letter
description: Write a real letter by hand and post it to someone. Stamp and all.

title: Do a Self-Guided Food Tour
description: Plan 3 food stops in your city you've never visited. Walk between them. Rate each one.

title: Attend or Perform at an Open Mic
description: Go to an open mic night. Bonus points if you perform — poetry, comedy, music, anything.

title: Go Kayaking, Canoeing, or Paddleboarding
description: Rent a kayak, canoe, or paddleboard and spend at least 30 minutes on the water.

title: Watch a Film at an Independent Cinema
description: Find an independent or arthouse cinema. Watch something you'd never normally choose.

title: Volunteer for a Half Day
description: Find a local organisation and volunteer your time — a food bank, animal shelter, community centre.

title: Try a Sport You've Never Played
description: Find somewhere to try a sport you've never done — badminton, table tennis, archery, fencing.

title: Explore an Industrial or Port Area
description: Walk through an industrial zone, port, or railway area you'd normally skip. Find beauty in function.

title: Invite an Acquaintance for Coffee
description: Think of someone you know but aren't close to. Invite them for coffee one-on-one.

title: Find a Rooftop or Viewpoint
description: Find the best view in your city — a rooftop bar, observation deck, or hilltop — and take it in.

title: Build Something with Your Hands
description: Build something physical — a shelf, a birdhouse, a candle, a piece of pottery. Make it real.

title: Visit a Local Bakery You've Never Tried
description: Find a neighbourhood bakery you've walked past but never entered. Try their signature item.

title: Attend a Public Lecture or Talk
description: Find a free lecture, author talk, or panel discussion happening near you and attend.

title: Take a Late Night Walk Through the City
description: Walk through your city after 10pm. See the streets differently when they're quiet.

title: Paint or Draw a Real Scene
description: Go outside, sit down, and spend at least 30 minutes painting or drawing what you see.

title: Find the Oldest Bar or Pub Nearby
description: Research and visit the oldest bar, pub, or café in your area. Have a drink there.

title: Run a 5K
description: Run 5 kilometres without stopping. Track it. Doesn't matter how slow — just finish.

title: Visit a Science Centre or Planetarium
description: Spend at least an hour at a science museum, planetarium, or observatory.

title: Organise a Game Night
description: Invite people over for board games, card games, or party games. Host it yourself.

title: Walk Along a Waterfront
description: Find a river, canal, lake, or coastal path and walk along it for at least 30 minutes.

title: Have a Music Lesson or Jam Session
description: Book a music lesson, join a jam session, or spend an hour seriously practicing an instrument.

title: Have Breakfast at a New Spot
description: Find a café or restaurant you've never tried and go there for a proper breakfast.

title: Start a Conversation with 5 Strangers
description: Over the course of the week, initiate genuine conversations with 5 people you don't know.

title: Do an Urban Sketching Session
description: Take a sketchbook to a busy area — a square, a market, a train station — and sketch people and buildings.

title: Find a Hidden Garden or Courtyard
description: Explore until you find a hidden courtyard, secret garden, or quiet square that most people miss.

title: Try a Tasting Menu
description: Find a restaurant offering a tasting menu or chef's selection and let them surprise you.

title: Climb the Tallest Point in Your Area
description: Find the highest hill, tower, or building you can access and climb to the top.

title: Attend or Start a Book Discussion
description: Join a book club meeting, or invite 2+ people to discuss a book you've all read.

title: Visit a Nearby Town
description: Take a day trip to a town within 1-2 hours of where you live. Walk its streets like a tourist.

title: Make a Short Film on Your Phone
description: Film and edit a short video — a 1-minute documentary, a timelapse, a story. Use only your phone.

title: Shop and Cook from an Ethnic Grocery Store
description: Visit an ethnic grocery store, buy ingredients you don't recognise, and cook something with them.

title: Walk Along an Entire Urban River
description: Pick a river or canal in your city and walk its full length (or as much as you can).

title: Attend a Bookshop Event
description: Find a bookshop hosting a reading, signing, or discussion and attend.

title: Reconnect with an Old Friend In Person
description: Reach out to someone you haven't seen in over a year. Meet them face to face.

title: Walk Through a District You've Never Entered
description: Find a part of your city you've genuinely never walked through. Spend 45 minutes exploring it.

title: Try a Fermented Food You've Never Had
description: Seek out a fermented food you haven't eaten — kimchi, miso, kefir, tempeh, natto — and try it.

title: Attend a Cultural Festival or Celebration
description: Find a cultural festival, market, or celebration happening near you and experience it.

title: Do Yoga or Stretch Outdoors at Dawn
description: Wake up early, find an outdoor spot, and do 30 minutes of stretching or yoga as the day begins.

title: Do a Walking History Tour
description: Follow a self-guided or group walking tour focused on the history of your area.

title: Create a Mini Zine
description: Make a small zine — fold paper, write, draw, collage. About anything. Give a copy to someone.

title: Try a Shared Plates Dining Experience
description: Visit a dim sum, tapas, meze, or izakaya restaurant. Order at least 5 different plates to share.

title: Run at Sunrise or Sunset
description: Go for a run timed so you're outside when the sun is rising or setting. Run towards the light.

title: Join a Local Community Group
description: Find a group that meets regularly — a running club, chess club, language exchange — and attend once.

title: Visit a Craft Brewery or Distillery
description: Tour a local brewery, distillery, or winery. Learn how they make what they make.

title: Do an Architecture Photography Walk
description: Spend an hour photographing the architecture around you — details, shapes, contrasts.

title: Do Something That Slightly Scares You
description: Identify one small fear — heights, singing in public, cold water — and face it this week.

title: Explore an Antique or Curiosity Shop
description: Find an antique shop or curiosity store and spend 30 minutes browsing. Ask the owner about one item.

title: Meal Prep Three New Recipes
description: Cook three recipes you've never made before in one session. Eat them throughout the week.

title: Go on a Night Photography Walk
description: Walk through your city at night with a camera. Capture lights, shadows, and empty streets.

title: Learn the Basics of a New Language
description: Pick a language you've never studied. Learn to introduce yourself, count to 10, and say 20 words.

title: Bring Food to a Neighbour
description: Cook or buy something and bring it to a neighbour's door. No reason needed.

title: Explore Something Underground
description: Visit an underground space — a metro station, a cave, a tunnel, a crypt, a cellar bar.

title: Complete an Outdoor Workout in a Park
description: Go to a park and do a full 30-minute workout — pull-ups, dips, sprints, whatever you can.

title: Visit a Farmers Market
description: Go to a local farmers market. Buy something directly from the person who grew or made it.

title: Browse a Record or Music Shop
description: Spend 30 minutes in a record shop, music store, or instrument shop. Buy or try something.

title: Teach Someone Something You Know
description: Find someone who wants to learn something you're good at. Teach them in person for at least 20 minutes.

title: Try a Dessert from a Culture You Don't Know
description: Find a dessert from a cuisine unfamiliar to you — mochi, baklava, churros, gulab jamun — and try it.

title: Cross a Body of Water
description: Take a ferry, boat, bridge walk, or swim across a body of water you haven't crossed before.

title: Attend a Live Sports Event
description: Go watch a live sporting event — football, rugby, basketball, tennis, anything with a crowd.

title: Write a Short Story
description: Write a complete short story — at least 500 words. Beginning, middle, end. About anything.

title: Share a Meal with Someone New
description: Invite someone you've recently met to share a meal. Cook for them or go to a restaurant together.

title: Explore Ruins or Abandoned Architecture
description: Find old ruins, an abandoned building (safe to enter), or crumbling architecture and explore it.

title: Experience a Tea or Coffee Tasting
description: Find a speciality tea house or coffee roaster offering a tasting. Learn to taste properly.

title: Walk at Least 15 Kilometres
description: Plan a walking route of at least 15km and complete it in one go. Pack water and a snack.

title: Attend a Comedy Show
description: Go to a stand-up comedy show, improv night, or comedy club.

title: Ask an Older Person About Their Life
description: Find someone at least 30 years older than you and ask them genuine questions about their past.

title: Sleep Outdoors
description: Camp in a tent, sleep in a hammock, or bivouac somewhere under the sky for one night.

title: Visit a Craftsperson's Workshop
description: Find a local artisan — a blacksmith, potter, glassblower, carpenter — and visit their workspace.

title: Walk to the Edge of Your City
description: Walk from where you are towards the edge of your city until the buildings end. See where it changes.

title: Host a Movie Night
description: Invite people over, pick a film no one has seen, make popcorn, and watch it together.

title: Buy Only Unfamiliar Foods at a Market
description: Go to a market and buy 5 items you've never eaten before. Cook with them this week.

title: Visit a Monument and Learn Its Full Story
description: Pick a monument or statue you walk past regularly. Research its full story and visit it with new eyes.

title: Perform Three Acts of Kindness for Strangers
description: Do three distinct kind things for strangers this week — help carry something, pay for someone, give directions with warmth.

title: Explore a University Campus
description: Walk through a university campus you've never visited. Sit in the courtyard. Browse the library.

title: Cook a Feast for Your Family
description: Plan and cook a multi-course meal for your family or housemates. Go all out.

title: Sing Karaoke
description: Go to a karaoke bar or event and sing at least one song in front of others.

title: Visit an Island or Peninsula
description: Find an island or peninsula within reach and spend time there. Cross water to get there.

title: Learn Basic First Aid
description: Watch tutorials or attend a session on CPR, the recovery position, and how to treat burns and cuts.

title: Eat Street Food from 3 Different Cultures in One Day
description: Find street food from three distinct cuisines in a single day. Rate each one.

title: Speak in Front of a Group
description: Find an opportunity to speak to a group — a toast at dinner, a question at a talk, a presentation at work.
